protocols.Paper_title: A simplified method for the extraction of baculoviral DNA for PCR analysis: A practical application
protocols.Evidence: “viral DNA was isolated in three steps: SDS lysis, chloroform extraction and ethanol precipitation… analysed by PCR.”

protocols.Paper_title: A simplified method for the extraction of baculoviral DNA for PCR analysis: A practical application
protocols.Evidence: “lysis buffer… 0.25% SDS… then centrifuged… DNA… precipitated with… ethanol… pellet… dried… 60 °C… used as template… PCR.”
